introSection: Adrenaline Peak is a steel roller coaster located at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA. The ride has a lighting package from KCL Engineering.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
On August 17, 2017, Oaks Amusement Park announced that it was opening a new roller coaster and holding a competition to name the ride. On September 24, Looping Thunder was closed to make way for the new coaster. In February 2018, the ride's name and opening date of the coaster were revealed. Adrenaline Peak opened on March 24, 2018.

The ride was built at a cost of $5,000,000.

sections.title: Trains
sections.content: Riders are held in by lap bars.

fullText:
Adrenaline Peak is a steel roller coaster located at Oaks Amusement Park in Portland, Oregon, USA. The ride has a lighting package from KCL Engineering.

On August 17, 2017, Oaks Amusement Park announced that it was opening a new roller coaster and holding a competition to name the ride. On September 24, Looping Thunder was closed to make way for the new coaster. In February 2018, the ride's name and opening date of the coaster were revealed. Adrenaline Peak opened on March 24, 2018.

The ride was built at a cost of $5,000,000.

Pink track and blue supports.

Riders are held in by lap bars.
